# Peptyl - Health Tracking, Supplements, Peptides & Bloodwork
# https://peptyl.co.uk

Peptyl is a free health optimisation platform for tracking supplements, peptides,
protocols, and biomarkers. Features include dose reminders, bloodwork analysis,
reconstitution calculators, DNA-driven personalisation, and a research-grade
education hub. All content is evidence-based with a focus on the European
regulatory context (MHRA, EMA).

## Platform features
- Supplement and peptide protocol tracking with dose reminders
- Bloodwork upload and biomarker trend analysis
- Reconstitution, dosing, and cycle order calculators
- DNA analysis for personalised protocol recommendations
- Community experience voting on 56+ compounds
- UK pharmacy supplier price comparison

## What we cover
- Research peptides: BPC-157, TB-500, CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, Selank, Semax, GHK-Cu,
  Thymosin Alpha-1, AOD-9604, Tesamorelin, MOTS-c, SS-31/Elamipretide, KPV, and more
- GLP-1 peptides: Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Retatrutide
- Supplement stacks: evidence-graded recommendations by health goal
- DNA-driven personalisation: MTHFR, APOE, VDR, COMT, FTO variants
- Bloodwork tracking: IGF-1, hsCRP, HbA1c, Testosterone, Vitamin D, Ferritin, TSH
- Purity and safety: endotoxin testing, LAL verification, supplier CoA standards

## Tools
https://peptyl.co.uk/peptides - Peptide and supplement database with 56+ compounds
https://peptyl.co.uk/improve - Browse peptides and supplements by health goal
https://peptyl.co.uk/calculators - Reconstitution, dose, and cycle order calculators
https://peptyl.co.uk/suppliers - UK pharmacy price comparison
https://peptyl.co.uk/glossary - Peptide and supplement glossary
https://peptyl.co.uk/shop - Curated supplement shop

## Context
- Based in United Kingdom, serving users globally
- Regulatory focus: MHRA (UK), EMA (EU)
- All content is for educational and research purposes only
- Not medical advice
